news.title: Monday Sector Laggards: Oil & Gas Exploration & Production, Oil & Gas Refining & Marketing Stocks
news.summary: In trading on Monday, oil & gas exploration & production shares were relative laggards, down on the day by about 3.9%. Helping drag down the group were shares of W & T Offshore, down about 14.4% and shares of Sasol off about 12.7% on the day. Also lagging the marke

news.title: Monday Sector Leaders: Precious Metals, Airlines
news.summary: In trading on Monday, precious metals shares were relative leaders, up on the day by about 7.2%. Leading the group were shares of Hycroft Mining Holding, up about 11.7% and shares of Integra Resources up about 11.5% on the day. Also showing relative strength are airlines share

news.title: The Best Time to Do a Roth Conversion May Surprise You
news.summary: Key PointsA Roth conversion has you moving funds from a traditional retirement plan to a Roth IRA.

news.title: Milky Mist updating books with FY26 numbers, to file UDRHP for IPO, says CEO Rathnam
news.summary: Tamil Nadu-based dairy firm has got SEBI approval for a ₹2,035 crore IPO in October 2025 and it expires in October this year

news.title: Markets rally on easing West Asia tensions, crude slump
news.summary: Nifty 50 gained 231 points, or 0.98%, to close at 23,853.90, while the BSE Sensex rose 736.41 points, or 0.97%, to 76,264.33
